meaning: n.私党,小圈子,派系,阀vi.结党
examples: Kids need a range of authentic role models—as opposed to members of their clique, pop stars and vaunted athletes.
He was accepted into the most popular clique on campus.
Vickie had long left their clique.
She felt like she was back in high school, trying to break into an elite clique.
But even Mr Karadzic's arrest would not mean the downfall of the Pale clique.
